provenance.derivation: frozen complete S7 cover projection joined exactly to S5 and O1

definitions.G: S4 in lexicographic zero-based word order
definitions.cover_space_Cov_U: unordered exact covers C subset Orb_L(U) by distinct masks
definitions.global_left_cover_equivalence: C'={hV:V in C} for one h in G
definitions.multiplier_realization: A subset G for which A x U -> G is bijective
definitions.multiplier_orbits_over_cover_orbit: global-left multiplier orbits over [C] are computed as selector sections R_U(C) modulo K_C
definitions.within_cover_piece_transitive: K_C has one orbit on the pieces of C
definitions.single_double_coset_test: B_C=K_C a H_U; applied to B_C, never to an arbitrary selector A

selector_independent_lift_B_C.definition: {g in G : gU in C} = A H_U, independent of selector A
